title: Mariposa
description: Giant sequoia forests inspired by Mariposa Grove
body:
# Mariposa

Giant sequoia forests inspired by Mariposa Grove in Yosemite National Park. Adds a new Sequoia tree, wood set, redwood forest biome, and a new building block: stacked logs!

[Giant Sequoia trees by Zerpen7](https://www.planetminecraft.com/project/epic-trees-huge-trees-pack-repository/)
